title: synaedrys sundaica
side_effects: Synaedrys sundaica can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of the Synaedrys sundaica plant may cause an imbalance in blood sugar levels, resulting in hypoglycemia or hyperglycemia. Furthermore, excessive consumption of its extracts can cause dizziness, headaches, and an increased heart rate.
